---
title: "Where to Dance in KW"
date-modified: today
language:
  title-block-modified: "Last Updated"
---
## Sunday May 17, 2026

### 👉 Corporate Retreat

Location: [120 Randall Dr.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/GCkUHA7UZrRd6jXZ9)

#### 9pm-3am

* [tobemas](https://www.instagram.com/andygarylee/)
* [10sekki](https://www.instagram.com/twoiism/)
* [rish.af](https://www.instagram.com/rish.af_/)
* [cultranaut](https://www.instagram.com/cultranaut/)
* [subvxrt](https://www.instagram.com/subxrt/)

[Tickets](https://partiful.com/e/vhNm6nSESemrhnKNSnER?)


## Saturday May 30, 2026

### 👉 Purple Room Reunion

Location: Revive Karaoke Bar @ [28 King St N, Waterloo](https://maps.app.goo.gl/5r3mSMYBSawvvNGh9)

#### 9pm-2:30am

* [Matt Lok](https://www.instagram.com/mattlok.dj/)
* [DJ Jace](https://www.instagram.com/dj_jace_jrfit/)
* [Sylent Syd](https://www.instagram.com/sylentsyd/)
* [Jermz](https://www.instagram.com/jermz0800/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DX7UUtWR3k0/)


## Tuesday June 2, 2026

### 👉 Under The Bridge

Location: DM [@underthebridge_dance](https://www.instagram.com/underthebridge_dance/) for details

#### 7pm-11pm

* [DJ Divaa](https://www.instagram.com/existentialcowgirl/)
* [DJ Delfine](https://www.instagram.com/djdelfine/)
* [Kasia](https://www.instagram.com/koshkasia/)
* [Rish.AF](https://www.instagram.com/rish.af_/)
* [DJ Ronnie V](https://www.instagram.com/dj_ronnie_v/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DYGg6k_jGqc/)


## Saturday June 6, 2026

### 👉 Pride in Paradise: The Crystal Room

Location: The Museum @ [10 King St W.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/NyLhFMoBFudPfztp8)

#### 8:30pm-late

* [Delicious DJ](https://www.instagram.com/deliciousdj_/)
* [DJ Divaa](https://www.instagram.com/existentialcowgirl/)
* [DJ UBU](https://www.instagram.com/diegg/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DYNDRTgFgz1/)


### 👉 Round & Round

Location: Button Factory Arts Centre @ [25 Regina St S.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/PL8h6rpDSYMdQPLw6)

#### 8pm-1am

* [Danasonic](https://www.instagram.com/danasonic_/)
* [R449](https://www.instagram.com/r4iv9_/)
* [DJ Zizek](https://www.instagram.com/corykobbert/)
* [Hallucinex](https://www.instagram.com/debaserhead/)

[Tickets](https://luma.com/vwdiah4u)


---

> Know of a dance party that we should share? [DM us](https://www.instagram.com/fearisthevibekiller/) or [email us](mailto:getdown@fearisthevibekiller.com).
